title: Telosiphonia brachysiphon
taxonomy: Telosiphonia brachysiphon is classified within the family Ceramiales, which is a group of red algae. More specifically, it belongs to the family Ceramiaceae. The order to which it belongs is Ceramiales, and the class is Rhodophyceae. The phylum where it is classified is Rhodophyta, and the kingdom is Chromista. This classification helps to group and identify Telosiphonia brachysiphon among other species of algae.
parts: Unfortunately, I could not find any specific information about the medicinal parts of Telosiphonia brachysiphon.
